parameters.query:
SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.phase_order, t.updated_at DESC) AS projects FROM (
  SELECT
    p.id, p.name, p.current_phase,
    CASE p.current_phase
      WHEN 'intake' THEN 1
      WHEN 'briefing_done' THEN 2
      WHEN 'design_done' THEN 3
      WHEN 'analysis_done' THEN 4
      WHEN 'costs_done' THEN 5
      WHEN 'trades_done' THEN 6
      WHEN 'proposal_done' THEN 7
      WHEN 'approved' THEN 8
      WHEN 'planning_done' THEN 9
      WHEN 'in_construction' THEN 10
      ELSE 99
    END AS phase_order,
    p.budget_target, p.location_city, p.updated_at,
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - p.updated_at)::int AS days_idle,
    c.name AS client_name
  FROM projects p LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id
  WHERE p.status='active' AND p.current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived')
) t;
